description_long: This is a single-story, modern-style house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and several trees. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored horizontal siding, and the house features large windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved driveway leading to a carport or garage area, with two cars parked outside. The backyard and side yards are landscaped with grass and mature trees, creating a suburban residential feel. The house has a clear main entrance with a simple, flat-roofed overhang and a paved walkway. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a driveway, trees, and parked cars. The exterior is clad in light horizontal siding, with a clear main entrance and open, airy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, two parked cars, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, large windows, and a car parked near the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional windows, and the back entrance with more visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the garage/carport area, pink car, and side yard with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, single door, and paved walkway, no porch or decorative columns.
